creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #7)

I'll note that I've not checked for analogous examples
of ofw_firmware displacing other forms of pre-existing
???_firmware instances outside the bcm2835_cpufreq code,
including not checked outside the RPi* specific code at
all.

If we are lucky, the RPi* code will be the only area with
the oddity.
